notes: FROZEN (agent=partial, daemon=incapable, driver=ready). kiro-cli's `/clear` does NOT rotate the session: the SAME ~/.kiro/sessions/cli/<uuid>.jsonl continues, a single `Clear` event is appended, and the parser skips it (parser.go:104-108) — no new session_id appears and the old session does not disappear, so the session-reset rotation arc (old row gone + new session_id in ready) cannot be produced via `/clear`. The daemon observes kiro faithfully (Source=FilesUnderRoot would detect a new UUID file as for codex); the signal is absent via /clear because it emits no rotation trace, hence incapable (no trace), not a bug. 2026-07-11 (issue #935): `/chat new` is now LIVE-VERIFIED to mint a genuinely new <uuid>.jsonl and freeze the old file, and drive-kiro-cli-interactive.sh's reset_session arm is implemented + end-to-end tested (driver=ready) — this supersedes the prior 'UNVERIFIED /chat new' finding the frozen route rested on. agent_supports/daemon_capability/route are left as originally assessed pending a dedicated re-assessment pass against this new evidence (see metadata.json's assessment body); no spec phases beyond this meta while still frozen. observations reflect kiro's JSONL carrying no model/token/cost (those live in the <uuid>.json sidecar, unread in v1): model unknown, cost/tokens zero.
